description: Divine beings from the upper planes — angels, holy steeds, and radiant guardians.
creatures: Angel
A radiant, winged messenger that descends in blinding light to heal the worthy and smite the wicked.
Archangel
A blazing war-general of heaven that leads celestial hosts with a flaming sword held high.
Deva
A serene celestial that walks among mortals in disguise, dispensing quiet justice.
Solar
The mightiest of angels, whose drawn bow fires arrows of pure starlight across the sky.
Planetar
A towering warrior angel with emerald skin and a greatsword that hums with divine wrath.
Pegasus
A white winged horse with a pure spirit that only permits the righteous to ride.
Ki-rin
A golden, antlered beast that walks on clouds and brings good fortune wherever it treads.
Couatl
A feathered serpent with iridescent plumage that radiates warmth and speaks in gentle riddles.
Unicorn
A silver-horned horse whose touch mends wounds and whose presence purifies corrupted ground.
Cherub
A child-faced celestial whose innocent smile belies the terrible divine power it guards.
Seraph
A six-winged celestial that burns with holy fire so bright it scorches mortal eyes.
Valkyrie
A warrior maiden on a spectral steed who descends onto battlefields to guide worthy souls onward.
